name: search_available_hotels
description: Search for available hotels. Filter by city, country, max price per night, or minimum stars. At least one filter must be provided. Returns only hotels with available rooms.

max_price.description: Maximum price per night in USD. Use 0 to skip this filter.

min_stars.description: Minimum star rating (1-5). Use 0 to skip this filter.

name: book_hotel
description: Book a hotel room. Creates a reservation with status PENDING.

hotel_id.description: The hotel ID from search results (e.g. 'grand-hotel-paris').

guest_name.description: Full name of the guest making the reservation.

name: get_booking
description: Retrieve the current status and details of a booking.

name: process_payment
description: Process payment for a PENDING booking. Updates status to PAID.

booking_id.description: The booking ID to pay for (e.g. 'BK-A1B2C3D4').

amount.description: Payment amount in USD. Must match the booking total.

name: confirm_booking
description: Confirm a booking after payment. Updates status from PAID to CONFIRMED.

name: cancel_booking
description: Cancel a booking and return the room to inventory.

name: validate_booking_rules
description: Validate business rules BEFORE executing a booking action. ALWAYS call this before book_hotel, confirm_booking, or cancel_booking.

action.description: The action to validate. One of: 'book', 'confirm', 'cancel'.

name: query_knowledge_graph
description: Execute a Cypher query (a graph database query language) against the hotel knowledge graph (a structured database of hotel information and relationships). Use this for questions about hotel amenities, policies, services, FAQs, comparisons, and aggregations. The graph is built automatically from hotel FAQ documents. Node labels: Hotel, Room, Amenity, Policy, Service. Relationships: HAS_ROOM, OFFERS_AMENITY, HAS_POLICY, PROVIDES_SERVICE.

cypher_query.description: A Cypher query to execute. Example: MATCH (h:Hotel)-[:OFFERS_AMENITY]->(a:Amenity) WHERE h.name CONTAINS 'Grand' RETURN h.name, a.name
